zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏弱整理
zh.content:
当前ETH价格运行于1790附近，略低于20日均线1799，短线跌破均线支撑后进入横盘震荡区间，整体呈偏弱整理结构，多空力量暂时平衡。

技术指标方面，MACD仍处于零轴上方但动能柱逐步收敛，显示上涨动能减弱，RSI缺失但从价格结构看未进入超卖区域，反弹力度有限。

下方支撑关注1788日内低点及1780整数关口，若跌破可能下探1760区域；上方阻力位于1806高点，进一步压力在1815至1820区间。

操作上建议维持区间思路，高抛低吸为主，未有效突破1806前谨慎追多，跌破1788则需防范回调加深并控制仓位与止损。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently trading with a mild bearish bias after failing to sustain levels above the short-term moving average. The price action around 1792 suggests consolidation after a recent attempt to push toward 1806, which now acts as immediate resistance. Overall structure remains range-bound, with neither strong bullish breakout momentum nor decisive breakdown pressure, indicating market indecision in the short term.

The SMA(20) at 1799.85 is acting as a dynamic resistance level, with price trading slightly below it, reinforcing near-term weakness. MACD reading of 8.44 indicates some residual bullish momentum, but without a visible signal line, confirmation is weak and unreliable. In absence of RSI, price behavior near the lower boundary of the daily range (1788.57) becomes more important for momentum assessment.

Immediate support is located at 1788, followed by a stronger demand zone near 1765–1775, where buyers previously showed interest. On the upside, resistance sits at 1806, and a breakout above this level would be required to re-establish bullish control, potentially opening a move toward 1825–1850. Failure to hold current support could trigger a deeper retracement toward the mid-1700 region.

From a trading perspective, the current setup favors range-bound strategies. Short positions near 1800–1806 with tight risk control may be considered if rejection signals appear, while long entries are more favorable closer to 1788–1775 with confirmation of reversal patterns. Until a clear breakout occurs beyond either boundary, disciplined position sizing and strict stop-loss placement remain essential in this low-momentum environment.
